title: ÜDEMER (Human Values Education Application and Research Center)
content:
ÜDEMER (Human Values Education Application and Research Center)

By clicking on the headings below,

ÜDEMER (Human Values Education Application and Research Center)

you can easily access relevant contents in the field.

Related Faculties

OBJECTIVES:

a) To conduct research on values and education in cooperation with stakeholders and to prepare and carry out training programs and implementation activities on the subject,

b) Preparing publications on values and education, supporting publication studies and providing scientific support services such as creating information banks and inventory inventory to increase the impact of publications.

c) To produce scientific solutions for sustainable human development, justice and the spread of democratic principles by preparing alternative solution proposal packages with the participation of different disciplines for problems related to the reconstruction of values.

a) To conduct scientific research on the teaching and reconstruction of values and to develop principles, strategies, models and solutions in this regard.

b) To conduct joint studies in dialogue with universities, governmental and non-governmental organizations on values and education.

c) To organize national and international scientific meetings and activities such as congresses, conferences, symposiums, panels, seminars, interviews, courses, exhibitions, and commemorative days for values and education.
